confirmationMessage.title: Confirmation Message
confirmationMessage.description: A confirmation message with the event details and a clickable link to the event

errorMessage.title: Error Message
errorMessage.description: Error message if the event could not be created

eventId.title: Event Id
eventId.description: The ID of the created Event record

eventLink.title: Event Link
eventLink.description: The direct URL to the created Event record in Lightning Experience
